subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from Our presence unto him who hath followed guidance and believed in God, the Lord of Names, when the Herald raised his call between [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من لدنا لمن اتبع الهدی و آمن بالله مالک الاسما اذ نادی المناد بین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @rendering assistance to God; victory [nusrat], @love of God
